services.title: Public Opinion
services.description: In-depth analysis of social trends, perception studies and political climate monitoring through quali-quantitative methodologies to guide governments, political actors and opinion leaders.

items.name: Opinion Studies
items.detail: Evaluation of national interest topics and their impact on the political and social environment.

items.name: Quantitative Surveys
items.detail: Custom sampling designs through periodic Tracking, Omnibus surveys (multi-client) and online measurements. Phone, household, face-to-face and point-of-sale applications.

items.name: Qualitative Research
items.detail: Focus groups, triad focus groups (to break the spiral of silence) and in-depth interviews with experts and opinion leaders.

items.name: Strategic Lines
items.detail: Management evaluation, actor positioning, voting intention, voter profiles and media message impact.

services.title: Public Affairs
services.description: Institutional relationship strategies, crisis management and positioning before regulatory stakeholders to anticipate scenarios and facilitate complex decision-making.

items.name: Strategic Lobbying
items.detail: Building legitimate institutional agendas before public decision-makers.

items.name: Government Relations
items.detail: Public-private alliances and transparent bridges with national and local authorities.

items.name: Crisis Management
items.detail: Immediate protocols and forward-looking strategies to mitigate reputational risks and socio-environmental conflicts.

items.name: Regulatory Analysis
items.detail: Active monitoring of bills and regulatory trends to prevent business impacts.

items.name: Methodology
items.detail: Situation diagnosis, political actor influence mapping and predictive scenario building.

services.title: Business Consulting
services.description: Strategic advisory and competitive intelligence for corporations. We combine traditional market research with sociological rigor to guide commercial and reputational goals.

items.name: Country & Environment Risk
items.detail: Political-social Due Diligence and macroeconomic or regulatory risk assessment before investments and projects.

items.name: Consumer Studies
items.detail: Habits, uses, profiles, market segmentation, corporate image, brand positioning and price sensitivity.

items.name: Innovation & Product
items.detail: Concept tests, packaging tests, organoleptic analysis and unmet needs detection.

items.name: Advertising Strategy
items.detail: Pre-Test, Post-Test and advertising Tracking evaluations to optimize campaign return on investment.

items.name: Advanced Techniques
items.detail: Ethnographic studies, customer experience audits (Mystery Shopper) and secondary research based on hard data.
